comment.body: A couple of interesting screenshots. The first is a daily timeframe showing the trendline SPX has been following since this rally got going mid-April. The second screenshot is exactly the same trendline on a 30 min chart.  The trendline crosses Alma's 5869.51 level (from the weekly post, a level confirming a break in current trend) almost exactly where price crossed that level.  Obviously a bit of subjectivity in drawing trendlines on a larger daily chart (where cross wicks etc) but I didn't "try" to make this fit this way, and thought it was a rather remarkable confluence.
comment.raw_body: A couple of interesting screenshots. The first is a daily timeframe showing the trendline SPX has been following since this rally got going mid-April. The second screenshot is exactly the same trendline on a 30 min chart.  The trendline crosses Alma's 5869.51 level (from the weekly post, a level confirming a break in current trend) almost exactly where price crossed that level.  Obviously a bit of subjectivity in drawing trendlines on a larger daily chart (where cross wicks etc) but I didn't "try" to make this fit this way, and thought it was a rather remarkable confluence.
